title: Headshot Respawn
description: Shoot mobs with ranged weapons to deal headshot damage
body:
When downloading please distinguish between two versions, one is a special version with many added things, and the other is a normal version with only the headshot function

When using this mod, when the projectile shot by the player hits the head of a creature, a prompt sound and particle effects will be emitted, and the creature hit by the headshot will be slowed down for 4 seconds and blinded for 2 seconds.

The damage of the headshot can be configured in Config
